name: slider
description: Gesture-driven range slider with configurable min/max/step, active track, thumb, and accessibility increment/decrement actions.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Callback fired as the user drags the slider thumb.

props.name: step
props.description: Increment step size when dragging or using accessibility actions.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, the slider is non-interactive and visually dimmed.

props.name: showValue
props.description: When true, displays the current numeric value above the track.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional text label displayed above the slider track.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the outer container.

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
const [volume, setVolume] = useState(70);
<Slider label="Volume" value={volume} onValueChange={setVolume} showValue />
